enrichment.summary: Kyle gives a rambling life update from Boulder, explaining he has pulled back from YouTube because he got obsessively focused on building his personal website. He shares he has been heavily using cannabis (pen vape, wax, shatter, hash), had a YouTube subscriber visit who smoked with him, and plans to convert his fireplace into a terrarium/garden. He also enthuses about the book 'Atlantis: The Antediluvian World' by Ignatius Donnelly, which he has been listening to on repeat.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Has lost motivation to post daily vlogs; videos were getting boring and repetitive; may not return for a year
Uses it heavily and enthusiastically; believes it enhances creativity and website design work; vape pen is cheapest and best for lungs
Most fascinating book he has ever read; believes Atlantis was real and the evidence Donnelly presents is compelling
Being in your own world is freeing; even homelessness with a laptop is a valid path if you want true independence

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I got a Facebook message suggesting I should do an update video.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I lost 50 subscribers because my videos were getting boring and repetitive.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I stopped making money from YouTube for the first time since late 2011.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I used the last of my college card to buy dirt for a garden project.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'm planning to turn my fireplace into a garden with plants and mirrors.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I need to cut glass to fit the fireplace for my garden project.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I considered using screws but realized clamps would be better for the glass installation.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I haven't been doing YouTube videos because I'm too focused on my website.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I've been working on one section of my website since before summer started.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I listen to my audiobook over and over until I memorize it.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: The audiobook is about the Atlantian alphabet and its connections to other ancient alphabets.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I believe Atlantis was real and the Greek gods were actually Atlantian kings.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: One of my YouTube subscribers visited and we smoked marijuana together.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I think hashish is like a smokeable concentrate similar to weed.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I use a pen for smoking concentrates, which is the cheapest and healthiest method.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I burned through a gram of concentrate in a week despite the dispensary saying it would last three weeks.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Smoking helps me focus and be more creative with my website.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I haven't checked my YouTube channel or comments in a long time.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I plan to finish my website before returning to YouTube, which might take a year.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I want to create multiple YouTube channels in the future, like a bike videos channel and a movie review channel.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I enjoy being in my own little world, focusing on my projects.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I think being homeless is a way to live in your own world if you're willing to give up comforts.
